message:
fix: reduce duplication, fix WebSocket error handling

Correctness:
- WebSocket exec now catches errors (was unhandled after removing
  redundant validateCommand)
- Remove duplicate validateCommand from HTTP/WS handlers (ProcessManager.exec
  already validates, workspace catch returns proper 400)

Code reduction:
- Make ContainerExecFn non-exported (only used internally)
- Simplify builtinTest with switch + single exit path
- Simplify grep by extracting test function before filtering
- Remove redundant validateCommand import from workspace
